description: Tether Gold (XAUt) is an ERC-20 token issued by TG Commodities Limited where each unit represents one troy ounce of physical gold held in custody, with a current circulating market value of {{xautMarketCap}}. The token is deployed behind an EIP-1967 transparent proxy and exposes off-chain controlled administrative functions: a single owner can mint new supply, freeze and destroy balances on a blocklist, and an upgrade authority can replace the implementation contract at any time. Both the token's `owner` and the proxy's upgrade authority resolve to the same custom 3-of-6 MultiSigWallet, making the multisig the single point of trust for supply, censorship, and code changes. There is no on-chain timelock or upgrade delay — once three signers confirm a transaction it executes immediately. This review covers only the Ethereum-native XAUt contract; XAUT0, the cross-chain version available on other networks, is a separate offering issued by Everdawn Labs via LayerZero and is out of scope here.

eth:0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C.name: Tether Gold MultiSig
eth:0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C.description: Custom on-chain multisig with six signers and a confirmation threshold of three. Holds the token's `owner` role and is the `owner` of the ProxyAdmin contract. Through the token it can mint XAUt, blocklist addresses via `addToBlockedList`, and permanently destroy blocked balances via `destroyBlockedFunds`. Through the ProxyAdmin it can upgrade the token implementation to arbitrary code via `upgrade` / `upgradeAndCall` or hand off the proxy admin slot via `changeProxyAdmin`. Both the signer set and the confirmation threshold are mutable on-chain via `addOwner` / `removeOwner` / `replaceOwner` / `changeRequirement`, which the multisig can execute on itself.

eth:0x856FCc085290ac1E40392442211e6a333a.name: ProxyAdmin
eth:0x856FCc085290ac1E40392442211e6a333a.description: OpenZeppelin-style ProxyAdmin contract set as the EIP-1967 admin slot of the Tether Gold token proxy. It exposes `upgrade`, `upgradeAndCall`, and `changeProxyAdmin` — all gated to its `owner`, which is the Tether Gold MultiSigWallet. The contract itself is immutable but acts as a pass-through layer for the multisig's upgrade authority over the token implementation.

eth:0xAC3B242E2E561da9F4cE34746E67d004E6.name: Multisig Signer (0xAC3B...1FA0)
eth:0xAC3B242E2E561da9F4cE34746E67d004E6.description: One of six EOAs registered as an owner on the Tether Gold MultiSigWallet. Can submit, confirm, and revoke confirmations on multisig transactions. Cannot act unilaterally — execution requires three of the six signers to confirm.

eth:0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622.name: Tether Gold Token (XAUt)
eth:0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622.description: ERC-20 contract for the XAUt token, currently representing {{xautMarketCap}} of circulating gold-backed claims. The contract itself does not custody collateral — physical gold is held off-chain — but it controls who can hold and transfer those claims, and the `mint`, `addToBlockedList`, and `destroyBlockedFunds` permissions on this contract directly determine total supply and individual holder balances.
